meta.note: Each entry stores the English source text, all known locations, and the translated value for this language.

html.click_the_round_add_button_below_to.source: Click the round add button below to add an athlete profile. This will let you start a baseline assessment and create an athlete profile that you can use to compare concussion scores over time for the athlete.

html.coordination_finger_to_nose_is_norm.value: Coordination. Finger-to-nose is normal for both hands with eyes open and closed.

html.did_your_team_win_the_last_game.79e.value: Did your team win the last game?

html.examiner_ask_the_athlete_the_follow.source: Examiner, ask the athlete the following questions and select the ones they answer correctly.
html.examiner_ask_the_athlete_the_follow.value: Examiner, ask the athlete the following questions and select the ones they answer correctly.

html.examiner_click_the_words_below_as_t.source: Examiner, click the words below as the athlete remembers them to cross them off. This will help keep track of how many they remember each trial.
html.examiner_click_the_words_below_as_t.value: Examiner, click the words below as the athlete remembers them to cross them off. This will help keep track of how many they remember each trial.

html.examiner_for_the_second_and_third_t.source: Examiner, for the second and third trials say the following:
html.examiner_for_the_second_and_third_t.value: Examiner, for the second and third trials say the following:

html.examiner_keep_a_count_of_the_errors.source: Examiner, keep a count of the errors listed above and read the instructions below:
html.examiner_keep_a_count_of_the_errors.value: Examiner, keep a count of the errors listed above and read the instructions below:

html.examiner_please_hand_the_device_to_.source: Examiner, please hand the device to the athlete to fill in the symptom scale (below) after you provide instructions.
html.examiner_please_hand_the_device_to_.value: Examiner, please hand the device to the athlete to fill in the symptom scale (below) after you provide instructions.

html.examiner_please_keep_the_3_meter_lo.source: Examiner, please keep the 3-meter-long athletic tape line from the Timed Gait on the floor/firm surface. You will follow the script below, click start/end timer, and click on the responses that the athlete correctly says in order. Redo trials where the athlete strays off the line.
html.examiner_please_keep_the_3_meter_lo.value: Examiner, please keep the 3-meter-long athletic tape line from the Timed Gait on the floor/firm surface. You will follow the script below, click start/end timer, and click on the responses that the athlete correctly says in order. Redo trials where the athlete strays off the line.

html.examiner_please_place_a_3_meter_lon.source: Examiner, please place a 3-meter-long line on the floor/firm surface with athletic tape. You will instruct the athlete and start/stop the timer for 3 trials.
html.examiner_please_place_a_3_meter_lon.value: Examiner, please place a 3-meter-long line on the floor/firm surface with athletic tape. You will instruct the athlete and start/stop the timer for 3 trials.

html.examiner_read_the_following_line_an.source: Examiner, read the following line and ask the following questions (modified to be appropriate to the relevant sport). Check the correctly answered questions.
html.examiner_read_the_following_line_an.value: Examiner, read the following line and ask the following questions (modified to be appropriate to the relevant sport). Check the correctly answered questions.

html.examiner_read_the_following_numbers.source: Examiner, read the following numbers (one sequence from each set) and ask the athlete to repeat them back in reverse order. Say them slowly at a rate of one digit per second. Each set has two number sequences. If the athlete fails the first, try the second. If both fail, end this subsection and move on to the months in reverse order.
html.examiner_read_the_following_numbers.value: Examiner, read the following numbers (one sequence from each set) and ask the athlete to repeat them back in reverse order. Say them slowly at a rate of one digit per second. Each set has two number sequences. If the athlete fails the first, try the second. If both fail, end this subsection and move on to the months in reverse order.

html.examiner_read_the_instructions_belo.source: Examiner, read the instructions below to the athlete and click to cross out the months as they say them in the correct order.
html.examiner_read_the_instructions_belo.value: Examiner, read the instructions below to the athlete and click to cross out the months as they say them in the correct order.

html.examiner_you_will_guide_the_athlete.source: Examiner, you will guide the athlete through 3 poses (double leg, tandem, and single leg stance) to be held for 20 seconds each. The later foam pad test is optional, only a solid floor/ground surface is required. You'll need a spotter to keep an eye on the athlete and be ready to assist them if they become unstable and begin to fall.
html.examiner_you_will_guide_the_athlete.value: Examiner, you will guide the athlete through 3 poses (double leg, tandem, and single leg stance) to be held for 20 seconds each. The later foam pad test is optional, only a solid floor/ground surface is required. You'll need a spotter to keep an eye on the athlete and be ready to assist them if they become unstable and begin to fall.

html.examiner_you_will_read_the_list_of_.source: Examiner, you will read the list of words 3 times, keeping track of how many words the athlete remembers after each reading. All 3 trials must be administered irrespective of the number correct on each. Start the first trial by saying the following:
html.examiner_you_will_read_the_list_of_.value: Examiner, you will read the list of words 3 times, keeping track of how many words the athlete remembers after each reading. All 3 trials must be administered irrespective of the number correct on each. Start the first trial by saying the following:

html.from_the_automated_bess_to_inform_m.source: from the automated BESS to inform more inclusive ML models.
html.from_the_automated_bess_to_inform_m.value: from the automated BESS to inform more inclusive ML models.

html.good_now_you_will_walk_heel_to_toe_.source: Good, now you will walk heel-to-toe and count backwards out loud at the same time. Keep counting until you finish walking the 3 meters, turning 180 degrees, walking the 3 meters again and the examiner says stop indicating you got to the last number. Are you ready? The number to start with is 88. Go!
html.good_now_you_will_walk_heel_to_toe_.value: Good, now you will walk heel-to-toe and count backwards out loud at the same time. Keep counting until you finish walking the 3 meters, turning 180 degrees, walking the 3 meters again and the examiner says stop indicating you got to the last number. Are you ready? The number to start with is 88. Go!

html.healthy_athletes_typically_complete.source: Healthy athletes typically complete the task in 18.7-22.5 seconds with 85.8-92.4% accuracy (0.9-1.7 errors). Concussed athletes typically take 30.6-36.1 seconds with 76.4-83.6% accuracy (2.0-2.8 errors).
html.healthy_athletes_typically_complete.value: Healthy athletes typically complete the task in 18.7-22.5 seconds with 85.8-92.4% accuracy (0.9-1.7 errors). Concussed athletes typically take 30.6-36.1 seconds with 76.4-83.6% accuracy (2.0-2.8 errors).

html.healthy_athletes_typically_have_a_f.source: Healthy athletes typically have a fastest time between 13.9 and 15.8. Newly concussed athletes are typically between 21.9 and 26.1. Athletes concussed within the last 6-73 days will be somewhere in between.
html.healthy_athletes_typically_have_a_f.value: Healthy athletes typically have a fastest time between 13.9 and 15.8. Newly concussed athletes are typically between 21.9 and 26.1. Athletes concussed within the last 6-73 days will be somewhere in between.

html.i_am_going_to_repeat_the_same_list_.source: I am going to repeat the same list. Repeat back as many words as you can remember in any order, even if you said the word before in a previous trial
html.i_am_going_to_repeat_the_same_list_.value: I am going to repeat the same list. Repeat back as many words as you can remember in any order, even if you said the word before in a previous trial

html.i_am_going_to_test_your_memory_i_wi.source: I am going to test your memory. I will read you a list of words and when I am done, repeat back as many words as you can remember, in any order
html.i_am_going_to_test_your_memory_i_wi.value: I am going to test your memory. I will read you a list of words and when I am done, repeat back as many words as you can remember, in any order

html.i_m_going_to_read_a_string_of_numbe.source: I'm going to read a string of numbers and when I am done, you repeat them back to me in reverse order of how I read them to you. For example, if I say 7 1 9, you would say 9 1 7. So, if I said 9 6 8 you would say?
html.i_m_going_to_read_a_string_of_numbe.value: I'm going to read a string of numbers and when I am done, you repeat them back to me in reverse order of how I read them to you. For example, if I say 7 1 9, you would say 9 1 7. So, if I said 9 6 8 you would say?

html.if_100_is_feeling_perfectly_normal_.source: If 100% is feeling perfectly normal, what percent of normal do you feel?
html.if_100_is_feeling_perfectly_normal_.value: If 100% is feeling perfectly normal, what percent of normal do you feel?

html.if_no_neck_pain_and_no_tenderness_a.source: If NO neck pain and NO tenderness, athlete has full range of ACTIVE pain free movement.
html.if_no_neck_pain_and_no_tenderness_a.value: If NO neck pain and NO tenderness, athlete has full range of ACTIVE pain free movement.

html.in_a_patient_who_is_not_lucid_or_fu.source: In a patient who is not lucid or fully conscious, a cervical spine injury should be assumed and spinal precautions taken. Check each box for yes, keep unselected for no.
html.in_a_patient_who_is_not_lucid_or_fu.value: In a patient who is not lucid or fully conscious, a cervical spine injury should be assumed and spinal precautions taken. Check each box for yes, keep unselected for no.

html.red_flags_are_signs_and_symptoms_th.source: Red flags are signs and symptoms that may indicate a more serious injury. If any of these are present, the athlete should be referred to a healthcare professional immediately.
html.red_flags_are_signs_and_symptoms_th.value: Red flags are signs and symptoms that may indicate a more serious injury. If any of these are present, the athlete should be referred to a healthcare professional immediately.

You'll need a spotter to keep an eye on the athlete and be ready to assist them if they become unstable and begin to fall.

runtime.bess.calibrate_prompt.source: Attempting to calibrate the pose detection model to the current pose. Please hold the pose for 10 seconds.
runtime.bess.calibrate_prompt.value: Attempting to calibrate the pose detection model to the current pose. Please hold the pose for 10 seconds.

runtime.bess.camera_notice.source: The automated balance system will use the camera.

runtime.bess.error.align_heel_toe.source: Please align the heel of the dominant foot with the toe of the non-dominant foot.
runtime.bess.error.align_heel_toe.value: Please align the heel of the dominant foot with the toe of the non-dominant foot.

runtime.bess.error.bend_elbows.source: Please bend both elbows without twisting the shoulders.

runtime.bess.error.cant_find_athlete.source: Can't find athlete. Please make sure they are fully in frame.

runtime.bess.error.dominant_foot_visible.source: The dominant foot must be visible in front of the non-dominant foot.

runtime.bess.error.left_hand_far.source: Left hand is too far from the hip. Please move it closer.

runtime.bess.error.lift_dominant_foot.source: Please lift dominant foot off the ground.

runtime.bess.error.move_dominant_forward.source: Please move the dominant foot further forward.
runtime.bess.error.move_dominant_forward.value: Please move the dominant foot further forward.
